name: revit_place_concrete_setout_points
description: Place setout point family instances on every geometry corner of structural concrete elements.

element_ids.description: Optional host element ids to limit placement (default: all matching concrete elements)

family_path.description: Optional path to SetoutPoint.rfa when the family is not already loaded

dry_run.description: When true, report corner counts without creating instances

notes: Requires shared parameters from shared_parameters.txt bound to the setout point family. Loads SetoutPoint.rfa from src/SetoutPoints/test/ when needed.
